_comment: Provisioned OAuth clients for peach-pi one-click Connect. Copy to ~/.pi/agent/peach-connectors-clients.json. PKCE providers (Linear, Google, Atlassian, Asana, Xero, Microsoft-365) need ONLY a client_id — it is not secret, safe to commit/share. Confidential providers (Notion, GitHub, Slack, Figma, Box, HubSpot, Intercom, Monday) need client_id AND client_secret; the secret is sensitive, keep this file out of git.
